problem: Switched battery master and avionics ON for database updates - gear pump simultaneously activated and ran for approximately 1-2 seconds.
action: Cleaned both GIA connectors. Checked for 3 greens with pump breaker pulled after parked overnight, no red indications. Pulled plane into hanger doing S turns/stop and goes, no red light during the tow. Jacked A/C and removed MX meter fuse. Retracted gear and pump bumped up pressure about every minute (would not cause reported issue). Cycled bypass valve several times and system held gear retracted pressure. No hose/hose fittings, actuator or bypass external leaks noted. Pump reservoir full. Focused on R/H down lock switch based on past history. Side loaded switch plunger in and out by hand while watching GIA switch input, would not hang, stick or fail. Cleaned switch connector located in the wing. At random and over several hours, cycled gear (25+ times) both motor driven and in bypass mode, could not get a red gear down light. Checked both main gear lock hook gaps, good. Could not duplicate reported problem.
